description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Sunday, January 25, the 24th Oku-Musashi Ekiden Relay Race took place.

This year, we welcomed 175 teams, including corporate teams, university teams, and high school teams that compete in relay races across the country, as well as teams formed locally.

Seeing the athletes run with all their strength along the Oku-Musashi routes brought great emotion and vitality to our citizens.

Congratulations to all the athletes who placed in the competition. I also extend my gratitude to everyone involved in running the event.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202601/13086.html
